scripts.test:functional-docker: docker compose build && docker compose up --exit-code-from browser-tests-tests
scripts.test:e2e: npx playwright-bdd --config playwright-bdd.config.ts test && npx playwright test --config playwright-bdd.config.ts
scripts.test:all: npm run test:functional-docker && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:update-snapshots-docker: docker compose build && NPM_COMMAND=update-snapshots docker compose up --exit-code-from browser-tests-tests
